summary.en: BTRC mandates IMEI registration for all mobile handsets and cellular-capable devices imported into or sold in Bangladesh. Unregistered IMEIs are blocked on Bangladesh mobile networks. Importers must register IMEIs with BTRC via the National Equipment Identity Register (NEIR) system prior to or at the time of importation. This requirement applies in addition to BTRC type approval and is enforced at the network level.
summary.zh: BTRC要求对所有进口至孟加拉国或在当地销售的移动手机及具有蜂窝功能的设备进行IMEI注册。未注册的IMEI将在孟加拉国移动网络上被封锁。进口商须在进口前或进口时通过国家设备身份注册（NEIR）系统向BTRC注册IMEI。此要求在BTRC型号核准之外另行适用，并在网络层面强制执行。
summary.zht: BTRC要求對所有進口至孟加拉國或在當地銷售的移動手機及具有蜂窩功能的設備進行IMEI註冊。未註冊的IMEI將在孟加拉國移動網絡上被封鎖。進口商須在進口前或進口時通過國家設備身份註冊（NEIR）系統向BTRC註冊IMEI。此要求在BTRC型號核准之外另行適用，並在網絡層面強制執行。

standards_or_laws: BTRC NEIR (National Equipment Identity Register) Directives
BTRC Mobile Device Management System (MDMS) Guidelines

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent mandatory IMEI registration system for device importers at the point of importation, although MIIT maintains device model records through the NAL (Network Access License) system and TAC (Type Allocation Code) registration via GSMA. IMEI allocation in China follows GSMA TAC procedures. Chinese NAL/TAC records do not satisfy BTRC NEIR registration for Bangladesh.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接对应的针对进口商在进口时进行IMEI注册的强制系统，尽管工业和信息化部通过网络接入许可（NAL）系统及经GSMA办理的TAC（型号分配码）注册维护设备型号记录。中国的IMEI分配遵循GSMA TAC程序。中国NAL/TAC记录不满足BTRC NEIR对孟加拉国的注册要求。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接對應的針對進口商在進口時進行IMEI註冊的強制系統，儘管工業和信息化部通過網絡接入許可（NAL）系統及經GSMA辦理的TAC（型號分配碼）註冊維護設備型號記錄。中國的IMEI分配遵循GSMA TAC程序。中國NAL/TAC記錄不滿足BTRC NEIR對孟加拉國的註冊要求。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — terminal equipment model records
GSMA TAC (Type Allocation Code) registration — IMEI allocation

gap.en: Full gap for mobile devices: BTRC NEIR IMEI registration is a standalone Bangladesh requirement with no Chinese equivalent. All cellular-capable handsets and devices must have IMEIs registered in the BTRC NEIR system before or at importation. Unregistered devices will be blocked on Bangladesh networks regardless of BTRC type approval status.
gap.zh: 移动设备存在完全差距：BTRC NEIR IMEI注册是孟加拉国独立要求，在中国没有等效制度。所有具有蜂窝功能的手机及设备须在进口前或进口时在BTRC NEIR系统中注册IMEI。无论BTRC型号核准状态如何，未注册设备将在孟加拉国网络上被封锁。
gap.zht: 行動裝置存在完全差距：BTRC NEIR IMEI註冊是孟加拉國獨立要求，在中國沒有等效制度。所有具有蜂窩功能的手機及設備須在進口前或進口時在BTRC NEIR系統中註冊IMEI。無論BTRC型號核准狀態如何，未註冊設備將在孟加拉國網絡上被封鎖。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] BTRC IMEI registration via the NEIR system is mandatory for all mobile handsets and cellular-capable devices before or at importation into Bangladesh. This is a separate obligation from BTRC type approval. Engage a local importer or BTRC-registered agent to complete NEIR registration; failure results in network-level blocking of the devices.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 所有移动手机及具有蜂窝功能的设备在进口至孟加拉国前或进口时，须通过NEIR系统进行BTRC IMEI注册。此义务独立于BTRC型号核准之外。建议委托本地进口商或BTRC注册代理人完成NEIR注册；否则设备将在网络层面被封锁。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 所有移動手機及具有蜂窩功能的設備在進口至孟加拉國前或進口時，須通過NEIR系統進行BTRC IMEI註冊。此義務獨立於BTRC型號核准之外。建議委託本地進口商或BTRC註冊代理人完成NEIR註冊；否則設備將在網絡層面被封鎖。
